commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=82fb23685a253e1a3e5357e62f475f53a7515d38)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes embedded-runner cleanup error precedence so a cleanup-time session takeover no longer replaces an earlier provider prompt error, and adds regression tests for both precedence paths.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main rejects cleanup errors after prompt errors, and the PR's harness simulates a cleanup lock release throwing takeover. I did not run the test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs a code repair plus contributor real-behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not request repair markers while the external proof gate is still missing.

target.title: fix(embedded-runner): preserve provider errors on cleanup takeover
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve the original prompt/provider error when embedded-attempt cleanup later reports `EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError`.
- Keep cleanup-only takeover errors fatal when there is no prior prompt error to report.
- Add regressions for both precedence paths.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: embedded runner cleanup can race with a session takeover after a provider prompt failure; the user-facing failure should remain the provider/prompt error, not the cleanup takeover.
- Real environment: local OpenClaw source worktree, rebased on `origin/main` (`aef93881af`).
- Exact command: `pnpm vitest run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`.
- Evidence after fix: the focused regression file passed with 2 files and 88 tests.
- Observed result: the new regression preserves the provider prompt error when cleanup throws a takeover, while a cleanup-only takeover remains fatal.
- Not tested: no live provider outage was forced against a production gateway; this was validated through the embedded-runner attempt harness that owns the cleanup/error precedence path.

## Tests
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `pnpm vitest run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `codex review --base origin/main` returned no findings

AI-assisted: yes. I understand the change and verified the narrow error-precedence behavior locally.
target.author: abnershang

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
